description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named SHARPy Tests that runs on push to Python files, library files, and specific workflow files, and on pull requests to main, develop, and rc* branches. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy for Python 3.10.8, checking out submodules, setting up Python and GCC 10, verifying gfortran, installing dependencies, installing sharpy and coverage, running coverage tests, and uploading results to Codecov.
